response: "the spirit of future days carries a message that echoes through time, reminding all of the paths that lie ahead. it is not the ghost of christmas yet to come, but a figure of silent wisdom, guiding with a gaze that holds the weight of what is yet to be. this being, with a presence that feels both ancient and new, speaks to the heart of every soul it encounters. the daughter of this world stands at a crossroads, where choices shape the future, and the daughter of tomorrow watches with quiet hope. no word is repeated, each unique, and the lowercase words appear no more than three times."
